parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
title PLAYER's Class Diagram

package cz {
    package kksffn {
        package player {
            interface IPlayer {
                + getCoordinatesOfShips()
                + getGuess()
                + getName()
                + isHuman()
                + updateGuesses()
                + updateGuesses()
            }

            abstract class APlayer {
                ~ coordinatesOfShips : HashMap<ShipName, ArrayList<Integer>>
                ~ isHuman : boolean
                ~ name : String
                + getCoordinatesOfShips()
                + getGuess()
                + getName()
                + isHuman()
                + updateGuesses()
                + updateGuesses()
            }

            class AI {
                + AI()
                + getCoordinatesOfShips()
                + getGuess()
                + updateGuesses()
                + updateGuesses()
                - setName()
            }

            class Human {
                + Human()
                + getCoordinatesOfShips()
                + getGuess()
                - setName()
                - setShips()
            }

            interface IStrategy {
                + findCoordinates()
                + updateGuesses()
                + updateGuesses()
            }

            class Strategy {
                - allGuesses : ArrayList<Integer>
                - allHits : ArrayList<Integer>
                - lastHit : int
                - lastHits : ArrayList<Integer>
                - myChances : int
                - myGuess : int
                - numberOfNotRandomMoves : int
                - rand : Random
                - sunkShips : ArrayList<ShipName>
                + findCoordinates()
                + updateGuesses()
                + updateGuesses()
                - addTheRightCells()
                - addToGuesses()
                - alreadyGuessed()
                - doNotGuessFourth()
                - doNotGuessThird()
                - isNotOnBottom()
                - isNotOnTheLeftEdge()
                - isNotOnTheRightEdge()
                - isNotOnTheTop()
                - shootNextToFirstHitAgain()
                - thinkOfWhatNotToGuess()
                - tryNearestCells()
                - tryToSinkCarrier()
                - updateGuesses()
            }

            IPlayer <|.. APlayer
            APlayer <|-- AI
            APlayer <|-- Human
            AI o-- IStrategy : think
            IStrategy <|.. Strategy
        }

        package prepare {
            class ISetShips {
            }
        }
        
        APlayer o-- ISetShips : sea
    }
}

@enduml
```
